meta.title: Pharmsource Animal Health | Built for the Future of Veterinary Distribution
meta.description: The national veterinary distributor built for a consolidating market. 9,000+ customers, 78% YoY growth in corporate hospitals, and a team that knows animal health from the inside out.

slides.title: Pharmsource Animal Health
slides.subtitle: The Distributor Built for Veterinary's Next Chapter.

slides.title: A Distributor Built Different
content: Pharmsource Animal Health isn't a general wholesaler that happens to stock veterinary products. We are a dedicated national veterinary pharmaceutical distributor, built from the ground up to serve the demands of animal health.

As a division of Pharmsource, LLC, an independent pharmaceutical company founded in 2014, we combine the scale of a national operation with the responsiveness of a team that genuinely understands veterinary care. From independent practices to multi-location corporate hospital networks, we show up where others can't.

slides.title: The Market Is Consolidating. We're Already There.
content: The U.S. veterinary industry is in the middle of a historic transformation. More than 60 major corporate practice groups are actively acquiring independent clinics, reshaping who buys, how they buy, and who they trust.

Corporate entities now control an estimated 25 to 50% of all veterinary practices and up to 75% of specialty and emergency hospitals. The demand for distributors who can serve complex, multi-location organizations at scale has never been higher. Most distributors aren't ready for it.
slides.highlight: We are. Pharmsource Animal Health is contracted with 32 corporate groups, actively serving over 4,130 hospitals and billing corporate entities directly.
slides.growthStat: 78% YoY Growth in Corporate Hospital Partnerships

slides.title: The Names That Trust Us
slides.description: When the largest veterinary networks in the country need a distribution partner, they choose Pharmsource Animal Health:

slides.title: The Scale to Back It Up
content: Pharmsource Animal Health generates approximately $15.5M in annual revenue, including $5.5M driven directly by corporate hospital partnerships, our fastest-growing segment.

Behind us stands the full financial strength of the Pharmsource organization: over $130M in annual revenue across our Human Health division. That gives us the infrastructure, supplier relationships, and capital to deliver consistently at any scale.

slides.title: Reps Who Actually Know Animal Health
content: Our sales team isn't hired from a generic pharma background and handed a catalog. Our 12 representatives come from inside the industry: veterinary technicians, professional dog handlers, groomers, and trainers. They don't just sell to this world. They've lived in it.

That credibility opens doors a traditional distributor rep never could. Each rep maintains 50+ meaningful customer touchpoints per day, because in veterinary, relationships aren't a soft skill. They're the business.

slides.title: The Infrastructure to Move Fast and Stay Compliant
items: Overnight delivery and full CSOS program compliance
Rapid Schedule II (C-II) controlled substance fulfillment
Seamlessly integrated with Vetcove and Coupa purchasing platforms
Active investment in AI-driven tools and a next-generation eCommerce portal

slides.title: We Don't Just Serve the Industry. We're Part of It.
content: Pharmsource Animal Health doesn't wait for customers to come to us. We show up in inboxes, at trade floors, and in the conversations that shape veterinary practice.

Our monthly newsletter reaches approximately 40,000 subscribers across the veterinary community. Our team maintains a consistent presence at the industry's most influential conferences, including VMX and WVC. That's not marketing. That's how you stay relevant in this industry.

slides.text: Pharmsource Animal Health. The Distributor Veterinary Trusts to Deliver. Value, Experience, Integrity.
